name: Overwhelming Blink
description: A horrifying dagger forged in the chaos maw and nigh untouchable by mortal hands.

abilities.name: Overwhelming Blink
abilities.description: Instantly teleports the wielder towards the targeted point. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: Global. Max Blink Distance: 1200. Radius: 800. Base Impact Damage: 100. After the teleportation, creates a huge shockwave that instantly deals damage to nearby enemies, based on the caster's strength, plus a base amount. Enemies also have their movement and attack speed slowed, and take additional damage over time based on the caster's strength.
